title: The Things I Stopped Being
summary: Chapter 18 of The Boy Who Never Stopped Trying is titled The Things I Stopped Being. Theme: Love removes parts of him he no longer needs.
sceneDescription: The things he stopped being become a release scene, where old shapes fall away in muted light.
